name: T.K.S. Technologies Public Company Limited
summary: T.K.S. Technologies Public Company Limited manufactures and sells continuous paper forms, securities printing products, and other printing and continuous labels primarily in Thailand and internationally. The company's products include digital print and mail forms, cheque on demand forms, warehouse management forms, advance forms, business forms, office papers, plastic cards, and flexible packaging products, as well as security form products, such as cheuqe, passbook, examination paper, security document, coupon, and gift voucher. It is also involved in the provision of information technology and software consultancy services, and warehouse and logistics management service. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Samut Sakhon, Thailand.
